programme.title: The Curse of Civil War Gold
programme.desc: Skattejegerne Rick og Marty er på sporet av gull fra borgerkrigen som skal ha blitt konfiskert fra Jefferson Davis i 1865. Deler av det ligger på bunnen av Lake Michigan, mens noe ligger i tunnelene under Michigan og en hule i Utah.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: Et øyenvitne i Spania gir teamet en viktig ledetråd i jakten på Hitlers fluktrute ut av Europa.

programme.title: Engineering Disasters
programme.desc: Hvorfor krasjlandet Asiana flight 214 med passasjerer og snurret rundt over hele rullebanen på San Francisco International Airport? Tre av familiene til de omkomne vil ha svar.

programme.title: Digging for the Truth
programme.desc: En grundig titt på de ulike teoriene rundt hvem som bygde pyramidene og når de ble bygd. Ligger svarene i den store Keops-pyramiden?

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation
programme.desc: Store triangler med utrolig akselerasjon og enorm fart har blitt sett over hele verden. Hva er disse objektene for noe? Og hva er formålet? Den tidligere agenten Chris Mellon leder etterforskningen.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens studerer bevis for romvesener gjennom 75 millioner år på Jorda; fra dinosaurenes tidsalder til antikkens Egypt og på himmelen over ørkenen i dagens USA.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: Roberts og Laidlaw har funnet en feil i marinens antiubåt-taktikk "Buttercup". Gjennom krigsspill med ulike scenarioer utvikler de en egen taktikk med kodenavn "operasjon Raspberry".

programme.title: Battles BC
programme.desc: Gjenopplev det første slaget i kampen om det forjettede land, der en avhopper i Jeriko hjalp israelerne med å infiltrere byen for å beseire den fra innsiden.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Hva ville skje med jorden hvis alle mennesker forsvant? Utbruddet undersøker muligheten for at rømte dyr, invasive vinstokker og et dødelig virus tar over kontrollen fra mennesker.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: Et øyenvitne i Spania gir teamet en viktig ledetråd i jakten på Hitlers fluktrute ut av Europa.

programme.title: Engineering Disasters
programme.desc: Hvorfor krasjlandet Asiana flight 214 med passasjerer og snurret rundt over hele rullebanen på San Francisco International Airport? Tre av familiene til de omkomne vil ha svar.

programme.title: Digging for the Truth
programme.desc: En grundig titt på de ulike teoriene rundt hvem som bygde pyramidene og når de ble bygd. Ligger svarene i den store Keops-pyramiden?

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation
programme.desc: Store triangler med utrolig akselerasjon og enorm fart har blitt sett over hele verden. Hva er disse objektene for noe? Og hva er formålet? Den tidligere agenten Chris Mellon leder etterforskningen.

programme.title: Digging for the Truth
programme.desc: Uredde Josh Bernstein leter etter den tapte gullbyen. Fra toppen av Andesfjellene og ned til Amazonas - kan han finne sannheten?

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside Americas UFO Investigation
programme.desc: I 2017 bidro Tom Delonge og Lue Elizondo til å få frigitt tre videoer fra amerikanske jagerflypiloter av "Tic Tac"-UFO-er. Disse videoene fikk marinen til å innrømme at de uidentifiserte farkostene faktisk eksisterer.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Hvorfor forteller mange kulturer lignende historier om monstre og kjemper? Kan de være øyenvitnegjengivelser om utenomjordiske vesener? Serien undersøker bevis på romvesener på jorden.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Se hvordan sola både kan være nyttig og skadelig for livet på jorda.

programme.desc: Ross forbereder seg på å utforske vraket av et dampskip, Iona II. Skipet gikk ned med en mystisk last om bord. Ross vil løse mysteriet og treffer en historiker som har avslørt det sjokkerende formålet med Iona II.

programme.title: Chasing Mummies
programme.desc: Det er tidlig om morgenen i Saqqara, og Zahi gjør seg klar til å åpne to forseglede graver for første gang på tusener av år. Men Zoe er sen igjen, og tålmodigheten hans begynner å bli tynnslitt.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: I Utah har gift playboy for mange kvinner og bestemmer seg for å kvitte seg med en av dem for godt, for å kunne fortsette sitt vellystige liv. Men slipper han unna med det?

programme.title: Disappeared: The Bradley Sisters
programme.desc: De pensjonerte etterforskerne Pam Childs, Judy Rolston og Ed Caroll ser nærmere på saken som har plaget Chicago siden 2001, da Tionda og Diamond Bradley forsvant sporløst.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: I 1996 blir en mor funnet død på siden av et øde strekk på en motorvei. Det ser ut til å være en ulykke der sjåføren har stukket av, men hva vil politiet avdekke?

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: I California forsvinner en kvinne sporløst. Politiet mistenker at romkameraten vet mer enn han hevder, men de har ingen bevis.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: I en småby blir en kvinne offer for en ondskapsfull forfølger. Når hun forsvinner, må politiet bevise at hun ble drept selv om liket ikke er funnet.

programme.title: How (Not) To Get Rid Of A Body
programme.desc: Etterforskerne i Las Vegas må løse drapet på en ung kvinne når hun blir funnet død i en kasse av tre og betong midt i ørkenen.

programme.title: How (Not) To Get Rid Of A Body
programme.desc: Saken om en savnet 17 år gammel gravid jente blir henlagt. Når den blir åpnet på nytt, jobber etterforskerne hardt for å finne en mistenkt.

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: De enestående historiene om vanlige folk som jobbet i hemmelighet for å hjelpe til med å løse mord. De avslører hvordan de samarbeidet med politiet.

programme.title: Id Kill for You
programme.desc: Linda treffer sin drømmemann, dr. Diazien Hossencofft. Men han er midt i en bitter skilsmisse - hvor langt vil ekskona gå for å få hevn?

programme.title: Forsvunnet
programme.desc: Et par forsvinner etter en date og familiene slår seg sammen for å finne dem. Men vil deres desperasjon og anklagelser forpurre etterforskningen?

programme.title: Forsvunnet
programme.desc: Åtteåringen Zachary Bernhardt forsvinner fra sitt hjem i Florida sent om kvelden mens moren er ute. Når en annen gutt forsvinner, begynner teoriene å svirre.

programme.title: Det perfekte mord
programme.desc: Millionæren og eiendomsutvikleren Ron Rudin forsvinner fra Las Vegas. Jakten på ham setter etterforskerne på sporet av onde ånder, besettelse og grådighet.

programme.title: Det perfekte mord
programme.desc: Filmprodusenten og tidligere basketstjerne Gavin blir meldt savnet. I mange år har familien og politiet prøvd å få svar, men spørsmålene er ubesvarte.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: En kvinne forsvinner fra hjemmet sitt i Bell Center, Missouri. I håp om å finne henne før det er for sent hjelper lokalbefolkningen etterforskerne i en omfattende leteaksjon.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: Da natt-resepsjonist Mary Klatt blir brutalt kvalt og drept på motellet hun jobber på, har lokalsamfunnet vondt for å fatte at noen kunne ønske å gjøre henne vondt.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: En ung firebarnsmor blir skutt og drept. Etterforsker Louie Aguileras jakt på rettferdighet fører ham ut av landet.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: En grusom morder kommer seg inn i huset til en kvinne gjennom et hull i veggen og tar livet av henne.

programme.title: Last Night In...
programme.desc: Oppdag byenes skyggesider før og etter solnedgang, når mørket forvandler det urbane landskapet og gir fantasien fritt spillerom.

programme.desc: En inspirerende gruppe sprer kjærlighetsmeldinger på nettet, men de blir skyteskive for et hatsk medlem av "mannosfæren" - med sjokkerende følger.

programme.desc: En orkan treffer Houston, og en mor blir borte. Politiet har få ressurser og spor, og ber Texas Ranger Jim Holland om hjelp.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: En mann som liker narkotika og ofte havner i problemer, blir et mareritt. En stripper forfører en sykelig løgner til å gjennomføre sin dødelige fantasi.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: Felisha gifter seg med Wesley og oppdager at han er egoistisk og slem. Når hun omsider går fra ham, tar han en grusom hevn.

programme.sub-title: I Always Feel That I Am Strange

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: Mens han blir forhørt om kidnappingen av en barista, inngår en lokal forretningsmann en avtale med politiet - og avslører sitt hemmelige liv som seriemorder.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: Frank Buschauer blir anklaget for å ha myrdet sin kone, Cynthia Hrisco, i et boblebad. Men familien hans holder fast ved at det var en forferdelig ulykke.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: En fersk college-student kom aldri tilbake etter en natt på byen i 1980. Politiet fulgte sporene hennes til et mystisk hus ved en innsjø, men etter 40 år har de ennå ingen svar.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Familien til Josh Clark elsker og støtter ham, men han ødelegger dem. Ingen ofrer mer for ham enn bestemoren hans, men hun får føle hans vrede. Nå vil moren og broren hans at han skal fortelle dem hvorfor.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Katie har alltid trodd at bestefaren Buster var en snill, gammel mann. Nå får hun vite den vonde sannheten: Han er egentlig en snikmorder.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: Kim Pandelios forsvinner etter en fotoseanse i Angeles nasjonalskog. Den skremmende sannheten om forsvinningen avsløres tolv år senere.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde

programme.title: Reprisesendinger Fra 19:30-sendingen og utover
programme.desc: Reprisesendinger Fra 19:30-sendingen og utover.

programme.title: Australia fra oven
programme.desc: På de endeløse tørre slettene i innlandet finner vi noen av Australias mest gjenkjennelige ikoner, som det massive, røde berget Uluru og den røde kjempekenguruen. Men hvordan oppstod dette ufruktbare sentrum av kontinentet?

programme.title: Australia fra oven
programme.desc: Great Dividing Range ble skapt av enorme krefter og strekker seg 3700 kilometer langs østsiden av Australia. Det er skillet mellom to veldig ulike verdener. Videoopptak fra luften og inngående studier viser hvordan dyrearter overlever og trives i dette fjellområdet.

programme.title: After the wildfires
programme.desc: Vi følger den enorme arbeidet som blir gjort for å gjenopprette skadene buskbrannene som herjet Australia i 2020, gjorde på villmarkslivet.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias ville vesten
programme.desc: Unngå skjelldekte og fjærkledde farer med wallabyer, se krageagamer kjempe om maker, og bli med på etegilde med nyklekkede krokodiller. Utforsk farlige stryk og forstår den kulturelle og biologiske viktigheten av en lokal elv i regnsesongen.

programme.title: Kalahari: Hemmelige allianser
programme.desc: Møt de uvanlige samarbeidspartnerne som jobber for å sikre at begge overlever i Kalaharibassenget. Lær mer om den symbiotiske forbindelsen mellom en elefantflokk og det fruktbærende treet faidherbia albida, alliansen mellom en surikat og en livlig drongo, samt flere andre umake par i plante- og dyreriket.

programme.title: Kalahari: Hemmelige allianser
programme.desc: Dyrene i Kalahari tørster etter regn i et fryktelig tørt år. Se samarbeidet mellom elefantflokker på desperat leting etter vann, og møt den merkverdige barnevakten til en surikat, som hjelper neste generasjon med å overleve.

programme.title: Kalahari: Hemmelige allianser
programme.desc: Møt forskere som har kommet til Kalahari for å teste ut hypotesen om at samarbeid mellom dyrene er nøkkelen til det forbløffende mangfoldet blant artene i regionen, og følg med når de observerer adferd, tolker informasjon og kommer med fascinerende konklusjoner.

programme.title: Villhunder: Å leve i flokk
programme.desc: Julz er inne i sin siste uke. Storkekolonien sprer seg etter et møte med en løve. Julz ser at Kakuli-valpene spiser av et pukukadaver, og Manzi-flokken slåss mot et villsvin ved Luangwa.

programme.title: Jordens utvikling
programme.desc: Dra til planetens hurtig smeltende poler, hvor dyr gir forskerne tips om vår fremtidige eksistens. Lær hvordan bevegelsene til isbjørner, pingviner og andre arktiske skapninger kan hjelpe mennesker å kartlegge (og unngå) global oppvarming.

programme.title: Jordens utvikling
programme.desc: Utforsk et av verdens mest vitale, men oversette, habitater, og lær hvordan gressletter kan forsinke klimaendringer ved å trekke til seg mer karbon enn skogene. Møt vitale arter, som bison og puma, som kan gjenopprette denne ressursen og helbrede planeten vår.

programme.title: Jaguardagbøker
programme.desc: Bli med Lizzie og Onçafari-teamet ut i Pantanal for å lete etter en savnet dominant hannjaguar. Følg med på kampen mellom de unge håpefulle, som outsideren Badalo, som vil overta makten og vinne over Fera og de andre lokale hunnene.

programme.title: Sjefshai
programme.desc: Se den ultimate kampen for dominans mens vitenskapsmenn prøver å identifisere alfahannen i en flokk på over 100 hvithaier ved kysten av New Zealand. Bli imponert av hastigheten, jaktferdighetene og fryktløsheten som avgjør hvem som skal lede flokken.

programme.title: Sjefshai: Kjønnskampen
programme.desc: Vær vitne til en annerledes haikonkurranse, der hvithaier stilles mot hverandre i en utrolig styrketest. Sett alt på spill med haispesialist Dr. Riley Elliott når han prøver å finne svar på et eldgammelt spørsmål: Hvilket kjønn er det beste?

programme.title: Den levende stranden
programme.desc: Florida er berømt for sine vakre sandstrender, og det er mange av dem. Delstaten har den lengste tidevannskysten av alle statene på det kontinentale USA. Disse lekegrindene ved havet er også kritiske habitater for sårbare og utrydningstruede dyrearter.

programme.title: Beistets overlevelse
programme.desc: Beveg deg rundt i Sri Lankas jungel med leoparden, som er kamuflasjens mester. Se hvordan denne formidable jegerkatten har tilpasset seg perfekt til det varme, tørre klimaet på øya, og få med deg dens beste triks for å forfølge og fange rådyr.

programme.title: Jordens utvikling
programme.desc: Dra til planetens hurtig smeltende poler, hvor dyr gir forskerne tips om vår fremtidige eksistens. Lær hvordan bevegelsene til isbjørner, pingviner og andre arktiske skapninger kan hjelpe mennesker å kartlegge (og unngå) global oppvarming.

programme.title: Dyreunger
programme.desc: De fleste dyreunger har en mor som oppdrar dem og viser dem hvordan de skal klare seg i villmarken. Spesielt pattedyrene er avhengige av moren sin. I denne episoden møter vi fire babyer fra ulike arter som oppfostres av mennesker og har surrogatfamilier.

programme.title: Sjefshai
programme.desc: Se den ultimate kampen for dominans mens vitenskapsmenn prøver å identifisere alfahannen i en flokk på over 100 hvithaier ved kysten av New Zealand. Bli imponert av hastigheten, jaktferdighetene og fryktløsheten som avgjør hvem som skal lede flokken.

programme.title: Sjefshai: Kjønnskampen
programme.desc: Vær vitne til en annerledes haikonkurranse, der hvithaier stilles mot hverandre i en utrolig styrketest. Sett alt på spill med haispesialist Dr. Riley Elliott når han prøver å finne svar på et eldgammelt spørsmål: Hvilket kjønn er det beste?

programme.title: Jaguardagbøker
programme.desc: Bli kjent med Fera, dronningen av Pantanal, mens hun lærer opp den livlige ungen Simba til å klatre i trær og jakte på middag. Så får du vite hvorfor Ferinha, en annen lokal hunn, sliter med morsrollen når flere hanner flytter inn og truer de små.

programme.title: Afrikas skjulte riker
programme.desc: En smal og ugjestmild landstripe langs vestkysten av det sørlige Afrika er full av kontraster der faunaen er nødt til å tilpasse seg for å overleve. Møt de særegne og karismatiske beboerne som hører hjemme i dette skjøre samspillet mellom land og hav.

programme.title: Afrikas skjulte riker
programme.desc: Størsteparten av året er det en ørken, men i august og september forvandles de støvete dalene i Namaqualand til et eventyrland dekket av villblomster. Opplev denne fantastiske forvandlingen når tørre ørkenområder blir til vakre oaser.

programme.title: Den levende stranden
programme.desc: Begge sidene av Nova Scotia viser at alle strender er laget av rå krefter som står i motsetning til hverandre, men også at balansen mellom disse kreftene er nødvendig hvis livet skal blomstre.

programme.title: Det ekstreme Afrika
programme.desc: Fjellkjeden Drakensberg i Sør-Afrika er et av de mest imponerende landskapene på kontinentet. Klima og miljø endrer seg jo høyere du kommer i de bratte fjellsidene, og både dyrene på landjorden og rovfuglene i luften må takle skiftende fysiske forhold.

programme.title: Sjefshai
programme.desc: Se den ultimate kampen for dominans mens vitenskapsmenn prøver å identifisere alfahannen i en flokk på over 100 hvithaier ved kysten av New Zealand. Bli imponert av hastigheten, jaktferdighetene og fryktløsheten som avgjør hvem som skal lede flokken.

programme.title: Kenguruenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Grå kjempekenguruer er får mange unger, men det byr på mange utfordringer å oppfostre dem. Rovdyr, ekstremvær og viltre unger gjør at kengurumødre må kjempe hver dag for å holde ungene i live.

programme.title: Puccini: Turandot - Staatsoper Vienna
programme.desc: Turandot . ‘Dramma lirico’ in three acts by Giacomo Puccini (1858 – 1924) . Libretto by Giuseppe Adami and Renato Simoni after Carlo Gozzi . First performance in Milan, Teatro alla Scala, 25 April 1926 . Subtitles available for this program with your remote control.

programme.title: InterMezzo
programme.desc: Espacio que incluye la emision de una seleccion de los mejores momentos musicales. Una manera diferente y muy variada de descubrir la música, los interpretes y las orquestas.

programme.title: Brahms: Symphony No. 1, Double Concerto – Christian Thielemann, Wiener Philharmoniker
programme.desc: Johannes Brahms 1833 - 1897 Concerto for Violin and Violoncello in A Minor, op. 102 Symphony No. 4 in E Minor, op. 98. Vienna, Musikverein, 5 April 2025.

programme.title: Joshua Weilerstein, Orchestre National de Lille : Pepin, Dutilleux, Franck
programme.desc: Camille Pepin 1990 - Laniakea. Henri Dutilleux 1916 - 2013 ‘Tout un monde lointain’, Cello Concerto . Cesar Franck 1822 - 1890 Symphony in D minor. Lille, Opera, 4 December 2025.

programme.title: InterMezzo
programme.desc: Espacio que incluye la emision de una seleccion de los mejores momentos musicales. Una manera diferente y muy variada de descubrir la música, los interpretes y las orquestas.

programme.title: Wagner: Tannhauser - Vienna Staatsoper
programme.desc: Tannhauser Great Romantic Opera in 3 acts by Richard Wagner 1813 – 1883 Libretto by Richard Wagner Dresden, Konigliches Hoftheater, October 19, 1845. Chorus of the Vienna State Opera . Vienna, Staatsoper, 25 May 2025.

programme.title: InterMezzo
programme.desc: Espacio que incluye la emision de una seleccion de los mejores momentos musicales. Una manera diferente y muy variada de descubrir la música, los interpretes y las orquestas.

programme.title: Yefim Bronfman, Wiener Philharmoniker, Yannick Nezet-Seguin: Beethoven, Strauss
programme.desc: Ludwig van Beethoven 1770 - 1827 Piano Concerto No. 3 in C minor, Op. 37. Claude Debussy 1862 - 1918 Images, Book II . Poissons dor. Richard Strauss 1864 - 1949 Ein Heldenleben, op. cit. 40. Directed by Elisabeth Malzer Vienne, Musikverein, 15 March 2025.

programme.title: Musikverein Vienna
programme.sub-title: Wiener Philharmoniker, Franz Welser-Most: Hindemith, Strauss, Schoenberg, Ravel
programme.desc: Paul Hindemith 1895 - 1963 Konzertmusik for wind orchestra, op. 41. Richard Strauss 1864 - 1949 Symphonic Fantasy from ‘Die Frau ohne Schatten’. Arnold Schonberg 1874 -1951 Variations for orchestra, op. 31. Maurice Ravel 1875 - 1937 La Valse, Poème choregraphique pour orchestre . Directed by Dominik Kepczynski Vienna, Musikverein, 24 February 2024.

programme.title: InterMezzo
programme.desc: Espacio que incluye la emision de una seleccion de los mejores momentos musicales. Una manera diferente y muy variada de descubrir la música, los interpretes y las orquestas.

programme.title: Igor levit, Wiener Philharmoniker, Christian Thielemann : Brahms
programme.desc: Johannes Brahms 1833 - 1897 Concerto for Piano No. 1 in D Minor, op. 15 Symphony No. 2 in D Major, op. 73. Vienna, Musikverein, 14 April 2024.

programme.title: Igor Levit, Wiener Philharmoniker, Christian Thielemann: Brahms
programme.desc: Johannes Brahms 1833 - 1897 Concerto for Piano No. 2 in B-flat Major, op. 83 Symphony No. 3 in F Major, op. 90. Vienna, Musikverein, 8 December 2023.

programme.title: Die groSSen Musikrivalen
programme.desc: Two men without whom the profession of conductor would not be what it is today. Two men who couldnt be more different from each other: Arturo Toscanini and Wilhelm Furtwangler. The former was rigorously faithful to the musical score, the latter conducted with radical subjectivity. In 1931 they both conducted at the Bayreuth Festival – for the first and last time. Soon the polite rivalry turned into bitter enmity. Both men were forced to take a stand on the regimes in their respective countries – and chose radically different paths. Toscanini, "the dictator

programme.title: Bruckner: Symphony No.9 - Sergiu Celibidache, Munchner Philharmoniker
programme.desc: In his late years, Sergiu Celibidache (1912-1996) focused his attention on one particular composer: Anton Bruckner. In March 1991 he rehearsed Bruckner´s Ninth in unusually long and intense sessions with the Munich Philharmonics. Using unpublished footage, this film shows the individual stages of this tantalizing process of a seemingly familiar piece being rediscovered. Again and again Celibidache interrupts the musicians to communicate his sharply articulated thoughts.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness åker Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino ut på boljan den blå i Skeppsbrott, hyllar barbrostad positivitet i Barbrostad energi och moter sina radslor i Slingerfobi.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Carly Aquilino prova for- och nackdelarna med Gungbrade-smarta, gå ut med Festblåsestok och stalla in backspeglarna for att Backa vårdslost.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Monika behover Tamis hjalp att reda på om hennes make som ar gymforeståndare har svettats på gymmet eller med en annan kvinna.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Under pandemin fortsatter tjejerna att hålla avstånd men det ar inte på grund av covid-19, och rumskompisarna blir overraskade nar de får reda på att Pauly inte ar ensam i karantan.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Desperata tider kraver desperata åtgarder, och ganget ar redo for familjesemester. RSVP har en listig plan for att samla tjejerna igen, men Deena har en egen overraskning som kan stalla till det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Nedrakningen till Angelinas ankomst startar, och nu måste de komma på hur de ska beratta for Deena. Samtidigt forsoker de leka Amor genom att ordna en dejtingshow for Singel-Ronnie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ganget inleder med att åka till Las Vegas. Efter festandet i Syndernas Stad åker de tillbaka osterut och firar i Atlantic City, innan de slår sig ner vid kusten over sommaren for att återuppleva fornstora dagar.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Terrorpaddan chockar villan genom att avsloja ett hemligt mote. Det ar romantik i luften for Grant, och kampen om Nads borjar.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Ricci berattar for Abbie att han tyckte Leah betedde sig som en narcissist under deras bråk nyligen Abbie tar illa vid sig av hans ordval och de blir osams. Det blir spant nar Jordan and Casey mots ansikte mot ansikte for forsta gången på månader.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness står Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino emot vinden i Aggressiv luft, kampar med atpinnar i Fummelpinnar och visar upp sina udda talanger i Fardighet ar fardighet.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I kvallen avsnitt av Ridiculousness drabbas Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino av skador med farforaldrar i Barnbarnsskada, får den skona stamningen sabbad av Stamningssankare och har lite sydstatskul i Lantisavslappning.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness slår Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino i skallen i Ingen hojdbedomning, tar examen i multitasking på Simultankapacitets-universitet och ser barn bli bortslapade i Hundar med barnslap.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness blir Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino lite val tavlingsinriktade nar det ska hjulas i Oavsiktlig hjulningsskada, bevittnar tunnelbanekaos i Galentåg och benar ut ett och annat med Skelettpolare.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness går Rob, Steelo och Karrueche Tran på lektion med Forelasnings-sabbare, motar bort hjortar i Hjortintrång och gor volter i Gymnastattacker.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness halsar Rob och Steelo Karrueche Tran valkommen for att se till att huvudena ar skyddade i Hjalmtestare, upptacker att åsnor behover rebranding i Vilka åsnor och upplever skracken i att komma till Fel hus.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta nya avsnitt av Ridiculousness får Rob, Steelo och Karrueche Tran respekt for trappor i Skoltrappan, forfasas over Skumma skålar och agnar sig åt viral dansdestruktion i Ta ut din TikTok.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness har Rob, Steelo och Karrueche Tran sonder saker på jobbet och det Dras av på lonen, får en bedårande aggressiv invasion i Ekorrinvasion och tappar sina horlurar i Hej då, horlurar.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie ar otrogen mot Luke. Whitney mår uselt over amningen. Angel blir stolt over Matt som lar sig lasa. Isha ar nere, men hoppas att ett nytt hus blir vandningen. Chloe får insikter om sin mammas liv.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK Next Generation
programme.desc: Whitney och hennes mamma bråkar. Matt blir romantisk och overraskar Angel. Isha ar avslagen, men ordnar andå inflyttningsfest. Ellie och Luke tar sig tid for att jobba på forhållandet. Chloe blir kanslosam nar EH fyller ett år.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK Next Generation
programme.desc: Nasta generation tonårsmammor ar tillbaka! Angel vantar barn nummer två! Chloe har en ny dromprins. Whitney forverkligar en drom. Isha gor sig klar for en avgorande paus med Jaime.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt av Ridiculousness ger Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Skye Townsend igen i Rattvisa for dumma skamt, slapper loss med Fall på klubben och kollar bilar som Forlorar varde.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Eugene Delacroix.You will discover his labour with The barque of Dante, Portrait of Aspasie, The assassination of the bishop of liege.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edgar Degas.You will discover his labour with Portrait of hilaire rene Degas, race horses, ballet rehearsal on the set.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Il y a une grande simplicite et un realisme troublant dans les figures du peintre lorrain Georges de La Tour (1593-1652). Marque par les œuvres du Caravage, il a produit des œuvres aux tonalites claires, comme la fameuse composition du Tricheur à l’as de carreau, mais aussi de nombreuses scènes nocturnes, au clair-obscur saisissant, simplement eclairees par la lumière d’une chandelle, comme dans Le nouveau-ne ou l’Adoration des bergers actuellement conserve au Louvre à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: LÉcole darchitecture de Porto, conçue par Álvaro Siza, reflète son approche minimaliste et respectueuse du contexte environnant. Inauguree en 1993, lecole sintègre harmonieusement dans le paysage, jouant sur des volumes simples et une lumière naturelle omnipresente. Siza a utilise des materiaux modestes comme le beton blanc, conferant à lensemble une sobriete elegante. Les espaces sont conçus pour encourager linteraction entre les etudiants et les enseignants, favorisant ainsi un environnement dapprentissage ouvert et fluide. Ce bâtiment incarne parfaitement la philosophie architecturale de Siza, où fonction et poesie se rencontrent.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Michelangelo Merisi (1571-1610), born in Caravaggio, is known as a wicked artist who had to flee Rome in 1606 after killing a man. But Caravaggio is above all a painter who changed the face of painting at the very beginning of the 17th century. Notice his use of colour in the people emerging from a dark background, like his “Bacchus” or “David”. One of his masterpieces is the cycle of the “Calling of Saint Matthew” in the chapel of the church of St- Louis-of-the-French in Rome.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures makes you discover the Bibliotheque Thiers in Paris. It is a place that houses many treasures that we do not suspect the existence. Today, we will visit this exceptional place which is the property of the Institute of France in search of the treasures it contains. Experts, historians, librarians, will guide us through the corridors and floors of this magical place.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musee d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Bernard van Orley, Brussels and the Renaissance
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Bernard Van Orley, Brussels and the Renaissane" at BOZAR in Brussels. This exhibition aims to rediscover the work of this great Brussels painter of the first half of the 16th century. He made paintings, but also tapestries. You will find his masterpiece "the polyptych of Job and Lazarus".

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.sub-title: Johannes Vermeer - Girl with a Pearl Earring
programme.desc: Vermeer’s ‘Girl with the Pearl Earring’ was chosen by the public as the most beautiful painting in the Netherlands. It is also called the Mona Lisa of the low countries. The artwork has an incredibly beautiful light and almost inscrutable build-up of paint layers. What technique did Vermeer use to achieve this? The course of light and sharpness is unprecedented for its time. And is the pearl a pearl? The team will try to unravel these secrets by re-creating the painting with all the technology of today and knowledge of the past. Masterpiece faces many challenges in the search for Vermeers secret.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: John Singer Sargent: Fashion and Swagger
programme.desc: John Singer Sargent is known as the greatest portrait artist of his era. What made his ‘swagger’ portraits remarkable was his power over his sitters, what they wore and how they were presented to the audience. Through interviews with curators, contemporary fashionistas and style influencers, Exhibition on Screen’s film will examine how Sargent’s unique practice has influenced modern art, culture and fashion.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: This gallery was built in the 16th century as the seat for Florence’s new administrative offices (uffizi), and opened to the public as the Uffizi Gallery in the 18th century. Today it still offers the world’s most beautiful collection of Italian Renaissance art. How could anyone remain insensitive to the sensual beauty of “The Birth of Venus” by Botticelli, “The Venus of Urbino” by Titian, or Correggio’s “Danae”? Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paul Serusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Serusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Lhumoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourdhui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche dhumour unique à lachat dantiquites. De son côte, Nancy, mannequin et presentatrice tele, sait aussi marchander et elle est très competitive ! Le couple est accompagne par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mysterieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous rencontrerons l’artiste Ben. Actif sur la scène de la creation contemporaine depuis plus de 50 ans, il est un personnage autodidacte aux multiples facettes. Son succès est indeniable. Si son statut d’artiste s’affirme à travers ses celèbres ecritures peintes en lettres cursives blanches sur fond noir, son temperament de « touche à tout » a fait de lui l’une des personnalites artistiques les plus avant-garde du monde de l’art depuis les annees 1960. Attache plus que tout à sa region, l’artiste travaille et vit depuis plus de 40 ans sur les hauteurs de Nice à Saint-Pancrace, dans une maison où chaque pièce peut devenir atelier, et où le manque progressif de place, l’a amene à creer une extension dont il nous ouvre aujourd’hui les portes.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherland painter, Vincent van Gogh.You will discover his labour with Self-portrait, Memory of the garden at Etten, Van Gogh’s chair.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Russian painter, Vassily Kandinsky. You will discover his labour with Old city n°2, Park of Saint-cloud, Rider (improvisation n°12).

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: In this episode we will decipher the most famous works of Johannes Vermeer. He was born in 1632 and lived his whole life in Delft. He painted mainly interior scenes, everyday life with middle-class people but also with servants. He is the author of "The Milkmaid

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: During the Renaissance the male body was portrayed less frequently than its female counterpart. With the advent of studies at the French Academy in Rome, the male nude became, on the contrary, the most important exercise for the student painter, to the point where a work portraying a naked man became known as “Academy Study”. Look at the figure in “Charon Ferrying the Shades” by Subleyras or the “Male Nude or Hector” by David. The male nude also represents the heroic nude, for example in Ingres’ painting “Oedipus and the Sphinx”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: The Paris Fine Arts School is one of the oldest and most prestigious art schools. Felix Duban (1797-1870) became its architect in the wake of the 1830 revolution. He would transform this high place of creativity into a veritable palette of architectures. From the Porticus of Octavia in Rome to the Florentine palaces, from the loggias of the Vatican to the polychrome frescoes of Pompeii, everything here is a citation, a souvenir - of Dubans study trip to Italy, for example - but also an ode to the past that remains exemplary for the students. Everything is created to educate the eye of these future artists. Duban thus organizes the general composition of the space around authentic fragments of monuments of the French Renaissance, harmoniously cohabiting different traditions and styles. It is a romantic vision of architecture - in rebellion against the academicism of the time -, a tribute to art as a whole whose perenniality is explained by its very diversity. Archives, models: a fasci.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: 200 years after it opened and a century after acquiring its first Van Gogh works, the National Gallery hosted the largest Van Gogh exhibition ever held in the UK (September 14, 2024 to January 19, 2025). The exhibition was a huge success, unanimously praised by the press, and tickets sold out quickly, making this film the only way to see what Forbes called a “once-in-a-lifetime exhibition.”Discover the passion that drove one of the worlds most beloved artists to revolutionize art. Van Gogh: Poets and Lovers rewrites history and celebrates Van Goghs genius without exploiting his suffering, allowing audiences to truly understand this iconic artist in a whole new way...

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Lucas Cranach l’Ancien (v. 1472-1553) est un artiste majeur de la Renaissance germanique, actif à Wittenberg dans la première moitie du XVIe s. Peintre officiel de Frederic le Sage, prince electeur de Saxe, il est proche du reformateur Martin Luther. Au-delà des thèmes bibliques, il s’interesse particulièrement à la representation du nu feminin, comme dans l’Adam et Eve de Besançon ou les fameuses Trois Grâces, recemment acquises par le musee du Louvre grâce à un appel aux dons.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paul Serusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Serusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: John Singer Sargent: Fashion and Swagger
programme.desc: John Singer Sargent is known as the greatest portrait artist of his era. What made his ‘swagger’ portraits remarkable was his power over his sitters, what they wore and how they were presented to the audience. Through interviews with curators, contemporary fashionistas and style influencers, Exhibition on Screen’s film will examine how Sargent’s unique practice has influenced modern art, culture and fashion.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Spencer Tunick, an American visual photographer. He is known for his photographic compositions featuring hundreds of volunteers, men and women, posing nude, mostly in urban settings. He does not define himself as a photographer, but as a creator of installations, the photos being only the representation of his works.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private tour takes you to discover the "Calder-Picasso" exhibition at the Picasso National Museum in Paris. The works of Pablo Picasso and Alexander Calder are exhibited and respond to each other, offering a real experience to the viewer. You will discover sculptures such as "Woman in the Garden" or "Shark and Whale".

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Mondrian is one of the greatest innovators of Modern art. He started out as a landscape painter, but became world famous as a painter of abstract works. Mondrian tried to depict the world behind the visible world. He wanted to create "universal

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Rembrandt van Rijn a realise ce tableau à lâge de 24 ans. Il sagit dun tableau incroyablement complexe dans lequel tout son talent est reuni : Leffet enchanteur entre lesquisse et le petit detail. Mais aussi lexpression de tous les differents materiaux tels que le velours, le metal, le corail rouge et la roche. Michel van de Laar, membre de lequipe, a restaure des œuvres de Rembrandt dans le passe et a decouvert que la peinture cachait quelque chose de special : Un cheveu de Rembrandt. Lors de la reconstruction, un cheveu sera egalement remis en place. Et pas nimporte quel cheveu : une recherche passionnante mène à un descendant de Rembrandt.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Monet est le fondateur de limpressionnisme, une forme dart qui met laccent sur lexperience de linstant, la vie moderne et la peinture en plein air. Ce tableau, realise lors dun de ses nombreux sejours aux Pays-Bas, est un element important de sa quete impressionniste. Charlotte, comme Monet, se rend sur les canaux pour peindre. Lequipe visite lancienne maison et latelier de Monet à Giverny, en France, et revient avec du materiel utile pour la reconstitution.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui etait Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie dune veritable icône, decouvrez son art et la verite qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementee. La combinaison dinterviews, de commentaires et dune exploration detaillee de lart de Kahlo, offre un tresor de couleurs et un festin de vitalite. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilegie à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa creativite febrile, sa resilience et sa soif inegalee pour la vie.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Rembrandt at the National Gallery, London and Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
programme.desc: Every Rembrandt exhibition is eagerly awaited, but this exhibition organized by Londons National Gallery and Amsterdams Rijksmuseum was an unprecedented event. The documentary highlights the historic Rembrandt exhibition, while tracing his life. Rembrandt is one of the greatest artists who ever lived, and this deeply moving documentary seeks to explore the truth about the man behind the legend.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musee du Petit-Palais a ete construit à Paris pour l’Exposition Universelle de 1900, en meme temps que le Grand Palais. La collection comprend des chefs-d’œuvre comme le Portrait de l’artiste en costume oriental de Rembrandt, le Port de mer au soleil couchant du Lorrain ou les Trois baigneuses de Cezanne. C’est egalement là qu’on peut admirer le fameux et très sensuel Sommeil de Gustave Courbet. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-Honore Fragonard.You will discover his labour with Psyche showing her sisters her gifts from cupid, The storm, Night scene or the Beggar’s dream.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edouard Manet.You will discover his labour with Lola de valence, Olympia, Eel and red mullet.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: Laura Botella left her life in Spain to embrace happiness in El Nido, Philippines, breaking societal norms to create her own path and call it home.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: Two urbanites surprise themselves by changing their city lifestyles for farm living : Lisa, an architect based in London, and her husband Pete, an actor seen in Hollywoodian movies such as “Ghost in the Shell” alongside Scarlett Johansson and a rock star in his own right in his native Malaysia. Together, they figured they were far from being ready for retirement. Instead, they dove headfirst into running an organic farm where they now both thrive while taking pleasure in returning to a simpler life.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Core Connection: Strengthen Your Center to Cultivate Core and Balance
programme.desc: A bold sequence, Core Connection uses confident poses to help you embrace your inner strength and let go of any tensions you might encounter. Use this balancing sequence to cultivate peace of mind, even through awkward or challenging situations.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers an intense cardio-training session. Guillaume and Sabrina invite participants to push themselves with dynamic and rhythmic exercises. The goal is to raise the heart rate to improve endurance and burn calories. This session is ideal for those who want to work out while having fun. Get ready to move and sweat in an energetic and motivating atmosphere.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Root to Rise: Balance, Twist, Hamstrings
programme.desc: Learn to stay open, no matter what happens, with the Root to Rise sequence. This practice provides an opportunity to explore your capacity for receiving energy, while building strength and confidence. When you maintain a connection to grounded energy, you can heighten your ability to stay present in every moment.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: This week, Kenelm, Aurelie, Virginie and Fred are the candidates for the title of Ace of the Week. But before they go head-to-head on their building sites, our budding decorators have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. Its a chance for them to gauge their opponents. On this first day of competition, Kenelm takes to the stage. At just 24, this Brussels native is the youngest decorator of the week. With a degree in architecture, he has developed a style all his own. An adept of minimalism and respectful of materials above all else, he hides another secret weapon...

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is structured in two parts: work on the posterior chain followed by strengthening the anterior chain. Guillaume and Sabrina guide participants through exercises that can be done solo or with a partner, using a wall or a partner for assistance. With a varied and interactive program, this session is ideal for a group workout.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Recharge and Revitalize: Hip and Shoulder Opening
programme.desc: Allow your breath to be bigger than the movements of your body in this invigorating sequence. All other instructions are secondary, as this sequence calls on you to use your breath as the only mediator between mind and body. Use this steady rhythm to inform your every moment of your life and practice.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest à Samia de jouer. À 31 ans, cette prof de sciences troque regulièrement ses livres de classe contre des bouquins de deco. Pour elle, la decoration, cest un peu comme une histoire damour. Avec son mari, Samia a d’ailleurs achete une maison quelle est en train de renover. C’est loccasion pour elle de sen donner à cœur joie et de tout repenser à son goût.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: C’est à Gregory de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest lui. Cet animateur pour enfants de 37 ans, originaire dEtterbeek, a une personnalite haute en couleurs. En tout cas, cest ce que disent ses amis. Et aux quatre coins de son interieur se trouvent les objets que Gregory pense, realise, couds ou customise à son gre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Les quatre chantiers sont maintenant finis. Anthony, Vanessa, Samia et Gregory vont entendre les critiques de leurs adversaires. Les proprietaires vont aussi rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que vont-ils penser de leur nouvel interieur ? Quelle note vont-ils attribuer ? Qui sera le coup de cœur de Valerie Damidot et qui remportera le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle decide de preparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des epices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Do wild animals still exist ? - Part 1
programme.desc: Animals represent 2/3 of the species on earth. We are increasingly concerned about our impact on the world. But what place does man have for the wild animal? Discover how it is possible to reintroduce wild animals in South Africa, or the disaster that took place with the sea lions in Namibia, and also how to preserve rhinos or other animals in biodiversity. There, women and men manage to protect wildlife every day.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers an intense cardio-training session. Guillaume and Sabrina invite participants to push themselves with dynamic and rhythmic exercises. The goal is to raise the heart rate to improve endurance and burn calories. This session is ideal for those who want to work out while having fun. Get ready to move and sweat in an energetic and motivating atmosphere.
